Off Calendar Mar-19-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances. Defendants and moving parties Donald Toines and Demetria Black, 415-305-2307, appeared in propria persona. Plaintiff and opposing party was not present.

The tentative ruling was adopted as the order of the court: defendant Demetria Black's demurrer is OVERRULED with five days leave to answer. Hon. James J. McBride. Reported by Eric Throne. CSR 7855 (jjm/cl)
